title: AttackThoughGrass
body:
This mod allows players to attack entities within certain plant blocks while holding weapons, rather than destroying plants. Currently, only vanilla melee weapons are supported. Olny client side need it could work.


DO NOT USE ON SERVER!!! if server master and members did not allowed you do that.

##Usage
Install this mod, join a world. It would work automatically.

## Supported Weapons
wooden_sword, stone_sword, iron_sword , golden_sword,, diamond_sword, netherite_sword, wooden_axe, stone_axe, iron_axe, golden_axe, diamond_axe, netherite_axe, trident, mace

## Can pass through these blocks
tall_grass, short_grass, fern, short_dry_grass, bush, dead_bush, dandelion, weeping_vines, weeping_vines_plant, sugar_cane, twisting_vines, vine, sunflower, lilac, rose_bush, peony, pale_hanging_moss

[You can now aim at entities within the tall grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df83414afee492334729125ef3fdd4cd46b6b9e0.png)
